examples: Her bank warned that unless she repaid the overdraft she could face legal action.
The banks made too many risky loans which now can't be repaid, and they speculated in property whose value has now dropped.
The money was repaid with interest.
In the arrangement, GE paid GM's suppliers at a discount, and GM in turn repaid GE.
To appease his critics, however, he repaid a few thousand dollars of the charges.
